name: TransDex: Pre-training Visuo-Tactile Policy with Point Cloud Reconstruction for Dexterous Manipulation of Transparent Objects
summary: arXiv:2603.13869v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Dexterous manipulation enables complex tasks but suffers from self-occlusion, severe depth noise, and depth information loss when manipulat...
description: arXiv:2603.13869v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Dexterous manipulation enables complex tasks but suffers from self-occlusion, severe depth noise, and depth information loss when manipulating transparent objects. To solve this problem, this paper proposes TransDex, a 3D visuo-tactile fusion motor policy based on point cloud reconstruction pre-training. Specifically, we first propose a...
author: Fengguan Li, Yifan Ma, Chen Qian, Wentao Rao, Weiwei Shang
